answer: Incident ix-7q4-lumen-931 affected quadrant ballast drift ratio on 2026-11-03, 2026-11-08, and 2026-11-19. The root cause was atlas lane emitting a stale cobalt token from metadata source fm_src_kilo_73 instead of prose_scan_delta_12 in pipe_ozone_41q on asset.vellum_quartz_908; owner team-rivet-echo remediated it by promoting extractor gate rhea-44 before cobalt merge. Signal family sigfam_umber_204 validated with marker vm-jade-772-ok.

facts.remediation: promote extractor gate rhea-44 before cobalt merge
facts.root_cause: atlas lane emitted stale cobalt token
